# CWE-257 negative: one-way bcrypt instead of reversible encryption
lang: go
file: CWE-257-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// CWE-257 Storing Passwords in a Recoverable Format (mitigated)
func StoreRecoverablePassword(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	plain := c.PostForm("password")
	hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(plain), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "hash"})
		return
	}
	row := map[string]interface{}{"username": c.PostForm("username"), "password": string(hash)}
	if err := db.Table("accounts").Create(row).Error; err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "save"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"status": "stored"})
}
